items.raw_excerpt: (Åpent for alle lesere) Det er for mange elsparkesykler i Bergen, mener Marlen Foseid.
items.summary_en: A local debate in Bergen, Norway argues that electric scooters have taken over the city. Marlen Foseid says this is discrimination against elderly people who cannot move around safely.
items.summary_ko: 베르겐에서 전동킥보드가 너무 많아 노인들의 보행을 위협한다는 지역 논쟁이 일고 있다. 마를렌 포세이드는 이것이 노인에 대한 심각한 차별이라고 주장한다.
items.title_en: Too many e-scooters in Bergen discriminate against the elderly
items.title_ko: 베르겐 전동킥보드 과잉, 노인 차별 논란
items.title_original: Debatt: – Grov diskriminering av eldre - Bergens Tidende

items.raw_excerpt: The most expensive trip, by members of Helsinki City's social and healthcare committee to Vienna, cost the municipal taxpayer some 52,000 euros.
items.summary_en: Helsinki City politicians spent about 350,000 euros on fact-finding trips abroad since 2024. One trip by the social and healthcare committee to Vienna cost taxpayers 52,000 euros.
items.summary_ko: 헬싱키 시의원들이 2024년 이후 해외 시찰 명목으로 약 35만 유로(약 5억 2천만 원)를 사용한 것으로 드러났다. 사회보건위원회의 비엔나 출장 한 건에만 납세자 부담금 5만 2천 유로가 들었다.
items.title_en: Helsinki politicians spent 350,000 euros on foreign trips since 2024
items.title_ko: 헬싱키 시의원들, 2024년 이후 해외 출장에 3억 5천만 원 사용
items.title_original: Capital region politicians splashed out €350k on fact-finding foreign trips since 2024

items.raw_excerpt: The Hari hotel brand will make its Singapore debut in spring 2027 after the former Holiday Inn Singapore Orchard City Centre is redeveloped into a 326-room luxury hotel.
items.summary_en: A Holiday Inn on Orchard Road in Singapore will be turned into a 326-room luxury hotel called The Hari. The new hotel is expected to open in spring 2027.
items.summary_ko: 싱가포르 오차드 로드에 있는 홀리데이인이 326개 객실의 럭셔리 호텔 '더 하리'로 탈바꿈한다. 새 호텔은 2027년 봄 문을 열 예정이다.
items.title_en: Holiday Inn in Singapore to reopen as luxury hotel The Hari in 2027
items.title_ko: 싱가포르 오차드 로드 홀리데이인, 2027년 고급 호텔 '더 하리'로 재개장
items.title_original: Holiday Inn Singapore Orchard City Centre to reopen as luxury hotel The Hari Singapore in 2027

items.raw_excerpt: LOS ANGELES, June 24 : Clad almost entirely in red and draped in South Korean flags, hundreds of Korean Americans transformed Liberty Park in Los Angeles' Koreatown into a slice of home on Wednesday, chanting, singing and dancing under the banner of a simple slogan: "Keeping Our Roots Eternal."The phrase ador
items.summary_en: Hundreds of Korean Americans wearing red and waving South Korean flags gathered at Liberty Park in Los Angeles' Koreatown. They chanted, sang, and danced under the slogan 'Keeping Our Roots Eternal.' The event turned the park into a festive piece of home.
items.summary_ko: 빨간색 옷을 입고 태극기를 흔든 수백 명의 한인들이 LA 한인타운 리버티 파크에 모였습니다. '뿌리를 영원히'라는 구호 아래 함께 노래하고 춤추며 응원전을 펼쳤습니다. 행사는 공원을 고향 같은 축제 분위기로 물들였습니다.
items.title_en: Korean Americans in Los Angeles Celebrate Their Roots at World Cup Event
items.title_ko: '뿌리를 영원히': LA 한인타운 월드컵 응원 현장
items.title_original: 'Keeping Our Roots Eternal': Korean Americans celebrate home at World Cup

items.raw_excerpt: La ruta 10 es la única que recorre la provincia de Córdoba de forma íntegra y por allí pasa gran
items.summary_en: Route 10 is the only road that crosses the entire province of Cordoba. Farmers from the south say the government paves some sections but ignores others, and they call it discrimination. The complaint has reached the Ombudsman's office.
items.summary_ko: 10번 국도는 코르도바 주를 가로지르는 유일한 도로다. 남부 농민들은 일부 구간만 포장되고 나머지는 방치되는 것은 차별이라며 주 옴부즈만에 진정을 제기했다.
items.title_en: Farmers in southern Cordoba demand equal road paving
items.title_ko: 코르도바 남부 농민들, 도로 포장 차별에 항의
items.title_original: El reclamo por la pavimentación de la ruta 10 llega a la Defensoría del Pueblo: “Para algunos hay y para otros no, es di - Bichos de Campo

items.raw_excerpt: Amsterdam’s VU university medical centre is to stop operating as a hospital in 2040 and will transfer all its care activities to the AMC teaching hospital in Amsterdam’s Zuidoost district by that date. The two university hospitals formally merged in 2018 under the moniker Amsterdam UMC. The organisation’s board said in a statement this week that it was too expensive to keep the VU hospital operational and the move would free up money for other investments. “Healthcare is becoming increasingly...
items.summary_en: Amsterdam's VU university medical centre will stop operating as a hospital by 2040. All care activities will move to the AMC teaching hospital in Amsterdam's Zuidoost district. The board says keeping VU open is too expensive.
items.summary_ko: 암스테르담 VU 대학병원이 2040년까지 병원 운영을 중단하고 모든 진료 활동을 AMC 교수병원(암스테르담 남동부)으로 이전한다. 2018년 이미 하나로 합쳐진 두 기관은 VU 병원 유지 비용이 과도하다고 판단했다.
items.title_en: Amsterdam teaching hospital to close and merge into AMC by 2040
items.title_ko: 암스테르담 VU 대학병원 2040년 폐쇄…AMC로 통합
items.title_original: VU university teaching hospital to close, merge into AMC

items.raw_excerpt: The survey found that older people tend to be irked by boastfulness, while the younger generation dislikes right-wing political parties, the lack of job opportunities, and the use of AI at work.
items.summary_en: A survey in Finland found that older people dislike boastfulness, while younger people are annoyed by right-wing parties, lack of jobs, and AI at work. Wars, selfishness, and telemarketers top the overall list.
items.summary_ko: 핀란드 설문조사에 따르면 노년층은 허풍을 싫어하고, 젊은층은 우파 정당, 일자리 부족, 업무 중 AI 사용에 짜증을 느낀다. 전체적으로는 전쟁, 이기심, 텔레마케터가 최상위 항목으로 꼽혔다.
items.title_en: Survey reveals what annoys Finns the most
items.title_ko: 핀란드인을 가장 짜증나게 하는 것은?
items.title_original: What annoys Finns the most? Wars, selfishness, and telemarketers

items.raw_excerpt: Every Thursday, the palliative care ward at the State-run Kidwai Memorial Institute of Oncology is filled with sounds that drown the usual hospital din. Patients and their caregivers gather for an hour of what is called “sound therapy.” Doctors said this initiative is helping address the emotional and psychological challenges that often accompany serious illness.
items.summary_en: Every Thursday, a palliative care ward in Bengaluru holds 'sound therapy' sessions for cancer patients and their caregivers. The hour of music and singing drowns out the usual hospital noise. Doctors say the weekly program helps patients cope with the emotional weight of serious illness.
items.summary_ko: 벵갈루루에 있는 키드와이 기념 종양 연구소의 완화 치료 병동은 매주 목요일 '소리 치료' 시간을 운영한다. 환자와 보호자들이 함께하는 한 시간 동안 병원 안은 평소와 다른 음악과 노랫소리로 가득 찬다. 의료진은 이 프로그램이 중증 질환의 정서적 부담을 덜어주는 데 효과적이라고 말한다.
items.title_en: Sound therapy brings comfort to cancer patients in Karnataka hospital
items.title_ko: 키드와이 병원 완화 치료 병동, 소리 치료로 환자에 위로 전해
items.title_original: At Kidwai’s palliative care ward, sound therapy offers moments of comfort beyond treatment

items.raw_excerpt: The shock closure of a Chinese language school after 17 years leaves parents and teachers with "unanswered questions" over the school's financial management.
items.summary_en: A Chinese language school in Australia closed suddenly after 17 years. Parents and teachers say they have unanswered questions about the school's money management. They wonder if warning signs were missed.
items.summary_ko: 호주의 한 중국어 학교가 17년 만에 갑자기 문을 닫으면서 학부모와 교사들이 학교 재정 관리에 대해 의문을 제기하고 있다. 학부모들은 폐쇄 전에 경고 신호가 있었는지 묻고 있다.
items.title_en: Chinese language school closes, leaving parents with questions
items.title_ko: 중국어 학교 17년 만에 폐교, 학부모들 '경고 신호 놓쳤나' 의문
items.title_original: Parent asks if 'warning signs' missed after Chinese language school closure

items.raw_excerpt: Royce Soh only wanted Pokemon card money when the 12-year-old agreed to promote his family’s handmade mee hoon kueh stall. He didn’t expect to become the star attraction.
items.summary_en: Royce Soh, 12, agreed to promote his family's handmade noodle stall for Pokemon card money. He did not expect to become the star attraction himself. Now he is famous and says he is too famous already.
items.summary_ko: 로이스 소(12)는 포켓몬 카드를 사고 싶어 가족이 운영하는 손칼국수 가게를 홍보하기로 했다. 그런데 자신이 스타가 될 줄은 몰랐다. 그는 이제 '내가 너무 유명해졌다'고 말한다.
items.title_en: 12-year-old boy becomes star of his family's noodle stall
items.title_ko: 포켓몬 카드 사려고 가게 홍보한 12살 소년, 스타가 되다
items.title_original: ‘I’m too famous already’: 12-year-old goes viral for promoting his mother's mee hoon kueh stall

items.raw_excerpt: An Amsterdam experiment to encourage plumbers, painters and other handymen to leave their polluting vans on the edge of the city and switch to a cargo bike, mini car or moped has flopped, with just three companies taking advantage of the scheme. The “Park + Switch” hub on the Piet Heinkade was supposed to be used by dozens of small companies heading into the city centre following the introduction of tougher environmental rules for vans in January 2025. “We would...
items.summary_en: Amsterdam built a transport hub where plumbers and painters could leave their vans and switch to bikes or small cars. Only three companies signed up. The project was meant to help dozens of small businesses follow new pollution rules.
items.summary_ko: 암스테르담이 배관공·페인트공 등 기술자들이 밴을 두고 자전거나 소형차로 갈아탈 수 있는 환승 거점을 만들었지만 단 3개 업체만 참여하며 실패했다. 이 허브는 2025년 1월 강화된 밴 배출가스 규제에 맞춰 수십 개 소상공인이 이용할 것으로 예상됐다.
items.title_en: Amsterdam's plan for a handyman transport hub flops
items.title_ko: 암스테르담 '기술자 환승 허브' 계획 참패
items.title_original: Amsterdam’s “transport hub” for plumbers and painters flops

items.raw_excerpt: The state government has passed legislation to delay South Australia's council elections until April 2027, after the Electoral Commission raised "very serious concerns" about its ability to administer the poll in November.
items.summary_en: South Australia's state government passed a law to delay council elections until April 2027. The Electoral Commission said it could not safely run the vote this year.
items.summary_ko: 사우스오스트레일리아 주정부가 지방의회 선거를 2027년 4월로 미루는 법안을 통과시켰다. 선거관리위원회는 올해 투표를 안전하게 치를 수 없다고 밝혔다.
items.title_en: South Australia delays local council elections to 2027
items.title_ko: 사우스오스트레일리아, 지방의회 선거 2027년으로 연기
items.title_original: SA council elections delayed amid review into March poll

items.raw_excerpt: Was machen, wenn es keine aktive Fußballmannschaft mehr gibt? Ganz klar – neue Wege gehen. Das dachte sich der SC Unteroberndorf, und hob beim diesjährigen Faschingsumzug in den Weltraum ab.
items.summary_en: SC Unteroberndorf did not have an active football team anymore. So they built a spaceship float for the local carnival parade. The club's rocket called 'SCU One' was the highlight of the parade.
items.summary_ko: SC 운터오버도르프는 더 이상 활성 축구팀이 없었다. 그래서 지역 카니발 퍼레이드에 우주선 수레를 만들어 출전했다. 클럽의 'SCU One' 로켓이 퍼레이드의 하이라이트였다.
items.title_en: No football team? This German club launched a spaceship at carnival
items.title_ko: 축구팀 없어진 동네 클럽, 카니발 퍼레이드에 우주선 띄웠다
items.title_original: Ab in den Weltraum: Aus Bavaria One wurde SCU One - Nachrichten am Ort

items.raw_excerpt: If you live in Berlin or Brandenburg, and you're seeking a place to escape from a scorching summer day, here’s out list of top attractions in 'cool' locations.
items.summary_en: The article lists seven attractions in Berlin and Brandenburg that stay cool on hot summer days. These places offer relief from scorching temperatures. Locations include parks, lakes, and other spots perfect for escaping the heat.
items.summary_ko: 이 기사는 무더운 여름날 시원하게 지낼 수 있는 베를린과 브란덴부르크의 명소 7곳을 소개한다. 공원, 호수 등 더위를 피하기 좋은 장소들이 포함되어 있다. 지역 주민을 위한 작은 휴식처 안내다.
items.title_en: Seven coolest places in Berlin and Brandenburg to visit on hot summer days
items.title_ko: 무더운 여름날 방문하기 좋은 베를린과 브란덴부르크의 시원한 명소 7곳
items.title_original: Seven of the coolest places in Berlin and Brandenburg to visit on hot summer days

items.raw_excerpt: Italian meteorologists describe mythological figures descending from Africa and ancient dog stars rising at dawn, when all you wanted to know was how hot it's going to get this weekend. So what exactly are they talking about?
items.summary_en: Italian meteorologists use mythological names and ancient star references in their forecasts. This guide helps you understand what they mean when you just want to know the weekend temperature. It explains the colorful language behind Italian heatwave reports.
items.summary_ko: 이탈리아 기상학자들은 일기예보에 신화 속 인물 이름과 고대 별자리를 자주 인용한다. 기온만 알면 되는데 도대체 무슨 말인지 모르겠는 이들을 위한 일기예보 표현 가이드다.
items.title_en: Italian weather forecast vocabulary explained
items.title_ko: 이탈리아 일기예보 표현 완전 정복
items.title_original: The heatwave vocabulary you need to follow an Italian weather forecast

items.raw_excerpt: Can you grasp the meaning of "at fatte"? If not, keep reading.
items.summary_en: Today's Danish word is 'fatte', which means to understand or grasp. The article asks if you can grasp the meaning of this common verb. It is part of a daily language learning series.
items.summary_ko: 오늘 배울 덴마크어 단어는 'fatte'로, '이해하다' 또는 '파악하다'라는 뜻입니다. 이 일상적인 동사의 의미를 알고 있는지 묻는 코너로, 매일 덴마크어를 배우는 시리즈의 일부입니다.
items.title_en: Danish Word of the Day: Fatte
items.title_ko: 오늘의 덴마크어 단어: Fatte
items.title_original: Danish Word of the Day: Fatte

items.raw_excerpt: Summer is almost here, and the pool season has started in Vienna. Here are six of the city's best ones that you should definitely visit.
items.summary_en: Summer is here and pool season has started in Vienna. Here are six of the best outdoor pools you should visit.
items.summary_ko: 여름이 거의 다가오면서 빈의 수영장 시즌이 시작되었습니다. 빈 시내 최고의 야외 수영장 6곳을 소개합니다.
items.title_en: The best outdoor pools in Vienna
items.title_ko: 빈 최고의 야외 수영장 베스트 6
items.title_original: IN PICTURES: The best outdoor pools in Vienna

items.raw_excerpt: The Hunebedcentrum for Neolithic tombs in Borger, Drenthe, is the unsuspecting owner of the prehistoric fossil of an eagle ray never before found in the Netherlands. The centre’s curator Harry Huisman carried out a chance inspection of the piece, which was part of a collection of so-called glacial erratics dug up by a sand dredging company in Groningen. He found it to be an eagle ray’s dental plate instead of a plant as was assumed earlier. The fossil of the...
items.summary_en: A museum in Borger, Netherlands discovered that a fossil thought to be a plant is actually an eagle ray's dental plate. The curator spotted it during a routine check of a collection of glacial stones. It is the first such fossil found in the Netherlands.
items.summary_ko: 보르거에 있는 선돌박물관(Hunebedcentrum)에서 식물 화석으로 알려졌던 표본이 사실 독수리 가오리의 이빨판으로 밝혀졌다. 큐레이터가 빙하 유석 컬렉션을 점검하던 중 우연히 발견했으며, 네덜란드에서는 처음 발견된 화석이다.
items.title_en: Fossil in Dutch museum turns out to be eagle ray dental plate
items.title_ko: 네덜란드 박물관 화석, 알고 보니 독수리 가오리 이빨판
items.title_original: Lots to chew on: study reveals fossil is eagle ray dental plate

items.raw_excerpt: Qantas has axed its direct Alice Springs-Melbourne route after "many decades", and will also restrict flights between Darwin and Singapore to the peak tourist season.
items.summary_en: Qantas is ending its direct flights between Alice Springs and Melbourne after many decades. The airline says high costs and low demand caused the decision. Flights between Darwin and Singapore will also be reduced to peak season only.
items.summary_ko: 콴타스 항공이 수십 년 만에 앨리스스프링스와 멜버른을 잇는 직항 노선을 없앤다. 항공사 측은 높은 비용과 수요 감소가 원인이라고 밝혔다. 다윈-싱가포르 노선도 성수기로만 제한된다.
items.title_en: Qantas cancels Alice Springs-Melbourne direct flights
items.title_ko: 콴타스, 앨리스스프링스-멜버른 직항 노선 중단
items.title_original: Qantas axes Alice Springs-Melbourne route amid high cost, falling demand

items.raw_excerpt: Summer can leave foreigners baffled by Danes’ seasonal habits. Here's our guide to small talk when the sun comes out.
items.summary_en: Summer brings out special Danish phrases that can confuse foreigners. This guide explains small talk expressions Danes use when the sun appears.
items.summary_ko: 여름이 되면 덴마크인들이 쓰는 특별한 표현들에 외국인은 당황하기 마련입니다. 이 가이드는 햇살이 나면 덴마크 사람들이 사용하는 가벼운 대화 표현을 소개합니다.
items.title_en: Five Danish phrases you only hear in summer
items.title_ko: 여름에만 듣는 다섯 가지 덴마크어 표현
items.title_original: Five Danish phrases you only hear in summer
